changelog:
THE FORTRESS UPDATE (v7.1):
- [SECURITY] Advanced HTML Sanitization: Added extreme data purging (strip_tags, filter_var) across all endpoints to prevent XSS injections from foreign nodes.
- [SYSTEM] The Station Archive: New one-click 'Backup Whole Station' feature exports the entire source code, media, and SQLite database as a ZIP file for seamless complete migrations.
- [CORE] Data Collision Mitigation: Injected PRAGMA busy_timeout into the core memory engine to eliminate SQLITE_BUSY errors during simultaneous high-traffic P2P bombardments.
